artifacts.description: The Category object defines groupings of products, and the Product object details categorical assignments, establishing a classification/master-data relationship.

evidence.summary: Defines the groupings or classifications of products offered by the enterprise, facilitating inventory management, sales reporting, and catalog navigation.
